chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 760 - وَ سَأَلَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَخَاهُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ وَ أَمَامَهُ مِشْجَبٌ عَلَيْهِ ثِيَابٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.760 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray while there is a rack with clothes hanging on it in front of him.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
